title: NG2 1LU, Pork Farms Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/SP3336UV/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Pork Farms Limited   Installation name: Queens Drive Baked Products   Permit number: EPR/SP3336UV/V002   "
